catalog.home.courses-list.title: Discover our courses
catalog.home.cta.description: Create your free account and start learning today with WutiSkill.
catalog.home.cta.title: Ready to accelerate your career?
catalog.static.about.lead: WutiSkill designs a structured, professional, and demanding learning experience with a simple goal: help everyone progress through useful, readable, directly applicable courses.
catalog.static.about.section.approach.bo: We favor clear content, progressive teaching structure, and a sober interface. The goal is not to add noise, but to make learning more efficient, readable, and lasting.
catalog.static.about.section.audience.bo: The platform is for learners, professionals, teams, and organizations looking for serious, outcome-oriented training designed for measurable skill growth.
catalog.static.about.section.mission.bod: We build a platform centered on real progression. Every path should help learners develop concrete skills, understand what they are doing, and move forward without unnecessary friction.
catalog.static.about.title: A platform designed for clear learning
catalog.static.common.contact-descriptio: Our team can answer questions about enrollment, platform usage, or managing your account.
catalog.static.faq.lead: This page gathers general answers to common questions about accounts, enrollment, personal data, and platform use.
catalog.static.faq.question.account.answ: You can create an account directly from the public platform. Once registered, you can access open courses, enroll in available sessions, and track your progress from your personal space.
catalog.static.faq.question.account.titl: How do I create an account?
catalog.static.faq.question.android.answ: Yes. The platform works in a mobile browser on Android phones. For the best experience, use an up-to-date version of Chrome, keep your phone charged, and switch to Wi-Fi when watching longer videos.
catalog.static.faq.question.android.titl: Can I take courses from an Android phone?
catalog.static.faq.question.certificates: Depending on the path, a certificate may be offered at the end of the course. Completion requirements and access mode are shown in each training page.
catalog.static.faq.question.data-usage.a: Data use depends mostly on video length and quality. Reading lessons and answering quizzes usually consume little data, while video lessons can consume much more. When possible, use Wi-Fi for video, downloads, and live sessions.
catalog.static.faq.question.data-usage.t: How much mobile data should I plan for a course?
catalog.static.faq.question.data.answer: Information collected during registration and platform use is used strictly to develop better courses, improve the user experience, and measure overall engagement. User data is hosted in Europe.
catalog.static.faq.question.data.title: How is my data used?
catalog.static.faq.question.deletion.ans: When you delete your account, associated data is completely removed from the platform within a maximum of 72 hours.
catalog.static.faq.question.deletion.tit: What happens when I delete my account?
catalog.static.faq.question.email-confir: Check your spam or promotions folder first, then confirm that the email address was entered correctly. If the message still does not arrive after a few minutes, contact support with the email address used during registration.
What should I do if I do not receive the confirmation email?
catalog.static.faq.question.enrollment.a: Open the course page, review the dates and requirements, then choose the enrollment option shown on the page. If the course is private or reserved for an organization, you may need an invitation or approval before access is enabled.
catalog.static.faq.question.enrollment.t: How do I enroll in a course?
catalog.static.faq.question.low-bandwidt: Most text pages, quizzes, and discussions can work on modest connections, but videos and live sessions need more stable bandwidth. If your connection is slow, close other apps, lower video quality when available, and retry during off-peak hours.
Does the platform work with a weak Internet connection?
catalog.static.faq.question.offline.answ: Some courses may provide downloadable files such as PDFs or documents. Video download availability depends on the course settings and rights for that content. The course page or courseware will show when a file can be downloaded.
catalog.static.faq.question.offline.titl: Can I download videos or materials to learn offline?
catalog.static.faq.question.pacing.answe: It depends on the course. Some content is self-paced, while other courses follow a schedule set by the course team. The course page always specifies the delivery mode and useful dates.
catalog.static.faq.question.pacing.title: Can I take courses at my own pace?
catalog.static.faq.question.password-res: Use the password reset link on the sign-in page. You will receive an email with instructions to create a new password. Choose a password you do not use on shared computers or other services.
How do I recover my password?
catalog.static.faq.question.pricing.answ: It depends on the course or program. Some learning paths may be open, while others may require payment, an invitation, or access through an organization. The course page displays the available enrollment option.
catalog.static.faq.question.progress.ans: Once enrolled, open the course from your learner dashboard. The course pages and progress area show completed content, grades when available, and the activities that still require attention.
catalog.static.faq.question.progress.tit: How do I track my progress in a course?
catalog.static.faq.question.quiz-issue.a: Refresh the page and make sure your browser is up to date. If you are using a phone, try landscape mode or a computer for complex activities. If the problem persists, contact support with the course name, unit title, and screenshot.
catalog.static.faq.question.quiz-issue.t: What should I do if a quiz or assignment does not display correctly?
Refresh the page, check your connection, and try another browser if possible. On mobile, switch between mobile data and Wi-Fi to compare. If the issue continues, send support the course name, video title, and a screenshot.
What should I do if a video does not load?
catalog.static.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
catalog.static.help.aside.body-one: Include the relevant course name, your account email address, and a concise description of the problem.
catalog.static.help.aside.body-two: If the request concerns personal data or account deletion, mention it at the beginning of your message to speed up processing.
catalog.static.help.aside.title: Before writing to us
catalog.static.help.lead: If you need help before or after enrollment, this page summarizes contact points and the most common cases handled by the support team.
catalog.static.help.section.account.body: The team can assist with questions related to login, the email address associated with your account, account deletion, or access to your personal information.
catalog.static.help.section.enrollment.b: We can help if you cannot enroll in a session, if course access does not activate correctly, or if you need clarification about dates, pace, or access conditions.
catalog.static.help.section.learning.bod: If you have difficulty reading content, progressing through a course, or accessing a certificate, describe the issue precisely so the team can respond quickly.
catalog.static.help.title: Help center
catalog.static.privacy.lead: This policy describes in general terms what information is collected, why it is used, and how it is deleted when you request account closure.
catalog.static.privacy.section.analytics: We use Google Analytics to measure overall engagement, understand path usage, and identify platform improvement points.
catalog.static.privacy.section.collectio: We may collect information during registration, platform browsing, course enrollment, and normal use of learning features.
When you delete your account, associated data is completely removed from the platform within a maximum of 72 hours.
catalog.static.privacy.section.hosting.b: User data is hosted in Europe. This includes account information, enrollment, learning progress, and technical data required to operate the service.
catalog.static.privacy.section.rights.bo: For any question about your data, its use, or account deletion, you can contact the team through the address shown on this page.
catalog.static.privacy.section.use.body: Information collected during registration and platform use is used strictly to develop better courses, improve platform use, and make the learning experience more relevant.
catalog.static.privacy.section.use.title: Use of data
catalog.static.privacy.title: Privacy policy
catalog.static.terms.lead: These terms describe the general rules that apply to platform use, content access, and user account management.
By using the platform, you agree to follow these terms and any specific rules indicated on certain courses, services, or features.
catalog.static.terms.section.account.bod: You are responsible for the information provided during registration, the confidentiality of your credentials, and the use of your account. Each account is personal and must not be shared without authorization.
catalog.static.terms.section.availabilit: The platform may evolve, be updated, or experience temporary interruptions. We aim to maintain a reliable service without guaranteeing absolute availability in all circumstances.
catalog.static.terms.section.changes.bod: We may evolve the platform, adjust certain features, or modify these terms to reflect actual usage, technical constraints, or applicable legal obligations.
catalog.static.terms.section.usage.body: Content offered on the platform is intended for learning use consistent with its purpose. Any attempt to misuse, abuse access, or reproduce content without authorization may result in access restrictions.
catalog.static.terms.section.usage.title: Use of content
catalog.static.terms.title: Terms of service
